prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! Remember, the task in front of you is just one small part of your entire work. You won't be judged by this one thing. You are learning and growing every step of the way. Breathe. One more deep breath and take your first step. You've got this! Break it down into little pieces and take breaks. You will get through this!
